body.title: Sprint-ticket: surface /outcome prompt when last ticket of a decision closes
body.result: outcome_check.py reads decision_id→palace spawned_tickets→checks all closed→prints /outcome prompt; wired into sprint-ticket Step 11
body.intention: I intend that the /outcome prompt surfaces automatically whenever a decision's last ticket closes.
body.description:
Expert audit (Process/Meta): /outcome loop has zero outcomes in 7 days despite 5+ decisions shipped. The sprint-ticket SKILL.md surfaces /outcome as a voluntary suggestion, not a mechanical prompt. Fix: add a step after ticket close that queries adc.palace for any decision linked to the ticket (via decision_id) and checks if all spawned_tickets are now closed — if so, print the /outcome prompt with the decision's hypothesis text.

**Affected files:** skills/sprint-ticket/SKILL.md (or lab/claudecode/ helper script)
**Design rules:** no new palace writes — read-only palace query; output only
**Scope boundary:** IN — post-close query + prompt display when decision is fully shipped; OUT — automatic /outcome execution, palace writes
**Completion criteria:** closing the last ticket in a decision's spawned_tickets list prints 'Decision D-xxx is fully shipped — run /outcome D-xxx: <hypothesis>'; closing a non-last ticket prints nothing
